name: Zombie
title: Zombie Cocktail | Zombie Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Zombie | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A bold tiki-style Zombie cocktail made with light and dark BACARDÍ rum, citrus, triple sec, and grenadine.
marketing_description: The infamous drink that instigated the tiki cocktail movement. Known for its blend of exotic rums, Zombie thrills with its bold, rich flavour. It’s ideal for all year round.

steps: Pour all ingredients into a shaker full of ice, and give it a good shake.
Strain and pour into a highball glass filled with crushed ice.
Give it a stir with a bar spoon.
Garnish with a cherry and orange slice.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Zombie Ingredients 30 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum 20 ml BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum 15 ml triple sec 30 ml orange juice 15 ml lime juice 15 ml simple syrup 5 ml grenadine ... Strain and pour into a highball glass filled with crushed ice. ... Garnish with a cherry and orange slice.
